author: śrīla narottama⋅dāsa ṭhākura
verses:
śuniyāchi sādhumukhe bale sarvajana
śrī⋅rūpa⋅kṛpāya mile jugala⋅caraṇa

hā! hā! prabhu sanātana⋅gaura⋅parivāra
sabe mili’ vāñchā-pūrṇa karaha āmāra

śrī-rūpera kṛpā jena āmā prati haya
se⋅pada āśraya jā’ra, sei mahāśaya

prabhu lokanātha kabe saṅge lañā jābe
śrī-rūpera pāda-padme more samarpibe

hena ki hoibe mora⋅narmasakhīgaṇe
anugata narottame karibe śāsane

śrī⋅rūpa⋅sanātane dainyamayī prārthanā
en_translation:
I have heard from the mouths of the saints, everyone says: by the mercy of Śrī Rūpa, one attains the lotus feet of the Divine Couple.

Ha! Ha! Prabhu Sanātana, Gaurāṅga's family! All of you together fulfill my desire.

May the mercy of Śrī Rūpa be upon me. He whose shelter is those feet—he is a great soul.

When will Prabhu Lokanātha take me along and offer me at the lotus feet of Śrī Rūpa?

Will such a thing happen to me—that the playful sakhīs will discipline this follower Narottama?

A humble prayer to Śrī Rūpa and Sanātana.
